title: The Spy Who Stole the Atom Bomb
original_title: The Spy Who Stole the Atom Bomb
overview: The fascinating story of Ursula Kuczynski, a Jewish German mother, refugee, and spy, who stole Britain's atomic secrets and gave them to the Soviets.
